title: FICHAS PRÁCTICAS PARA AYUDAR A LOS GANADEROS A GESTIONAR EL RIESGO DE BIOSEGURIDAD EN SUS EXPLOTACIONES
description: A set of practical factsheets designed to help livestock farmers understand and apply French biosecurity regulations on their farms. The materials include simple guidance, risk analysis tools, and recommendations tailored to different production systems to support farmers in drafting their own biosecurity plans.
